postReview.title: San Diego FC 2-1 LA Galaxy: Lozano scores stoppage-time winner to seal dramatic victory
postReview.description: Hirving Lozano netted a stoppage-time winner to secure a vital win for San Diego FC against LA Galaxy in MLS.

preReview.title: San Diego FC v LA Galaxy: Varas knows what is on the line in 'special' derby
preReview.description: Bottom-of-the-league LA Galaxy travel to local rivals San Diego FC and are still looking for their first win of the season after 14 games.

QAData.question: Who won between San Diego FC and LA Galaxy on Sat, 24 May 2025 20:45:00 GMT?
QAData.answer: San Diego FC won 2–1 over LA Galaxy on Sat, 24 May 2025 20:45:00 GMT.
